'''[[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] Krieg''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stationed at [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Krieg employed a pro-Imperial spacer to carry out a couple of missions for him—the escort of an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]], the defense of Kachirho from a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike force, and the relief of two [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] deep within [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]]. His command was soon taken over by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who sent the spacer another mission, but Krieg remained on Kashyyyk.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Krieg appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

"Krieg" is also the German word for "war".

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
